channel.title: Automation on Robert Akhmerov | v31dt
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Robert Akhmerov | v31dt

item.title: AI Hackbot Scaffolding
item.description:
This is a follow-up to my podcast episode, Future of Bug Bounty and How to Build Your Own HackBot. After that conversation, I kept thinking about the practical question behind the whole idea: now that the models are getting so strong, how much scaffolding do you actually need?

My current conclusion for black-box bug bounty and security testing is this:

A small, sane scaffold gets you around 60-80% of the practical benefit of a much bigger system.
